name: Gladiator Beast Samnite
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣闘獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>グラディアルビースト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>サムニテ
desc: When this card, that was Special Summoned by the effect of a "Gladiator Beast" monster, destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can add 1 "Gladiator Beast" card from your Deck to your hand. At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card battled: You can shuffle it into the Deck; Special Summon 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster from your Deck, except "Gladiator Beast Samnite".
mnst_eff: When this card, that was Special Summoned by the effect of a "Gladiator Beast" monster, destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can add 1 "Gladiator Beast" card from your Deck to your hand. At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card battled: You can shuffle it into the Deck; Special Summon 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster from your Deck, except "Gladiator Beast Samnite".
eff: When this card, that was Special Summoned by the effect of a "Gladiator Beast" monster, destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can add 1 "Gladiator Beast" card from your Deck to your hand. At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card battled: You can shuffle it into the Deck; Special Summon 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster from your Deck, except "Gladiator Beast Samnite".

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
Returns itself from field to Deck for cost
misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
